name: Kenya levelling tolerance — 10√K mm with K in km

source.notes: Also restated in RDM 1.1 (2025) §5.3. Tolerance is 10 * sqrt(K) mm where K is the levelling line length in kilometres. This is the Kenya variant of the ISO 17123-2 general survey tolerance.

rounding: Tolerance values rounded to 0.1 mm at display time only. Mid-computation values use full float64 precision.
